title: ALP Policy Object
description: Declarative guardrails that govern what autonomous agents may do: which file paths they may touch, which shell commands they may run, which agents may act, and resource budgets. Introduced in ALP v4 (The Federation Era).

applies_to.description: Which agents this policy governs. Use "*" (or omit) for all agents, a single agent id/ref, or a list.

allow_paths.description: Glob patterns of file paths agents governed by this policy may modify.

deny_paths.description: Glob patterns of file paths agents may never modify. Deny takes precedence over allow.

allow_commands.description: Shell command prefixes agents are permitted to execute (e.g. "npm test").

deny_commands.description: Shell command prefixes that are forbidden (e.g. "rm -rf", "git push"). Deny takes precedence over allow.

enforcement.description: "strict" blocks disallowed actions; "warn" only reports them. Defaults to "strict".
